allow: Bash(cd D:/project/ClawX/src-tauri && timeout 300 cargo check 2>&1 | tail -50)
Bash(cd D:/project/ClawX/src-tauri/icons && cp ../../resources/icons/* . 2>&1 || echo "Will generate icons later")
Bash(cd D:/project/ClawX && timeout 30 pnpm tauri:dev 2>&1 || true)
Bash(cd D:/project/ClawX && timeout 30 pnpm tauri:dev 2>&1 | head -100)
Bash(taskkill //F //IM node.exe 2>&1 && sleep 2 || echo "No node processes to kill")
Bash(taskkill //F //IM clawx.exe 2>&1 || echo "No clawx processes to kill")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr :18789 || echo "Port 18789 not in use \(Gateway not started\)")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5173 > /dev/null && echo "Frontend running on http://localhost:5173" || echo "Frontend not accessible")

Bash(taskkill //F //IM node.exe 2>&1
taskkill //F //IM clawx.exe 2>&1
sleep 3
netstat -ano | findstr :5173 || echo "Port 5173 is free")
Bash(tasklist | findstr clawx && echo "App is running!" || echo "App not running")
Bash(taskkill //F //IM clawx.exe 2>&1 && taskkill //F //IM node.exe 2>&1 || echo "Processes killed")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5173 > /dev/null && echo "Frontend OK" || echo "Frontend not accessible")
Bash(tasklist | findstr clawx && echo "App running" || echo "App not running")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr :18789 || echo "Port 18789 not in use")
Bash(sleep 5 && curl -s http://localhost:5173 > /dev/null && echo "Frontend OK" || echo "Frontend not accessible")
Bash(sleep 10 && curl -s http://localhost:5173 > /dev/null && echo "Frontend OK" || echo "Still starting...")
Bash(sleep 5 && netstat -ano | findstr :5173 && echo "Frontend running" || echo "Frontend not yet")
Bash(tasklist | findstr clawx && echo "App running!" || echo "App not running")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5173 > /dev/null && echo "✅ Frontend accessible" || echo "❌ Frontend not accessible")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr :18789 && echo "✅ Gateway port open" || echo "❌ Gateway not started")
Bash(tasklist | grep -i "node\\|openclaw\\|gateway" || echo "No matching processes found")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":18789" || echo "Port 18789 not in use")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":18789" || echo "Port 18789 is now free")
Bash(tasklist | grep -i "node" || echo "No node processes found")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":5173" || echo "Port 5173 not in use")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":5173" || echo "Port 5173 is now free")
Bash(tasklist | grep -i "clawx\\|tauri" || echo "No ClawX processes found")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":18789" || echo "Gateway port not active yet")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":5173" || echo "Vite dev server not active yet")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":5173\\|:18789" || echo "Ports still not active")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5173 | head -20 || echo "Vite dev server not responding")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:18789/health 2>&1 || echo "Gateway not responding on port 18789")
Bash(test -f "$HOME/.openclaw/openclaw.mjs" && echo "OpenClaw entry script found" || echo "OpenClaw entry script NOT found")
Bash(find D:/project/ClawX -name "*openclaw*" -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -v target | head -10)
Bash(cmd //c "taskkill /F /IM clawx.exe" 2>&1 || echo "No ClawX process to kill")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":18789" || echo "Gateway port not active")
Bash(tasklist | grep -i "clawx" || echo "ClawX not running yet")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":5173\\|:18789" || echo "Ports not active yet")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5173 2>&1 | head -5 || echo "Vite not responding")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":5173" || echo "Vite port not active")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5173 | head -10 || echo "Vite not responding")
Bash(tasklist | grep -i "clawx" || echo "No ClawX process found")
Bash(netstat -ano | findstr ":5173" || echo "Vite dev server not active")
Bash(dir "%USERPROFILE%\\.openclaw\\device-identity.json" 2>nul || echo "Device identity file not found")

Bash(node -e "const crypto = require\('crypto'\); const payload = 'v2|1f9310c72320d7ebf22f1d4ee05509a92d12aaff56a66e09f217ed036b4f7cc0|gateway-client|ui|operator|operator.admin|1773369339958|aINEF9LBrWrCOuelP8VvJP7C646W1Aq2|db9a02ee-ef73-4d4b-8350-484ef8fad61e'; console.log\('Payload length:', payload.length\); console.log\('Payload:', payload\);")
Bash(timeout 60 bash -c "tail -f /dev/null" 2>&1 || echo "Waiting for app to start...")
